# thoth_api_key (Resource)

Creates and manages tenant-scoped JIT Thoth API keys.

This resource is a legacy shape and is superseded by:

- `thoth_fleet_api_key`
- `thoth_endpoint_api_key`
- `thoth_agent_api_key`

This resource only supports creating fleet, endpoint, and agent scoped keys.
Organization-scoped keys are intentionally excluded from provider-managed creation.
Create organization keys with `thothctl api-keys create ...` and supply them
to Terraform/Pulumi via `THOTH_API_KEY` or `org_api_key`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `permissions` (List of String) Allowed permissions: read, write, execute.
- `scope_level` (String) Scope level for issued key. Supported in provider: fleet, endpoint, agent. Organization keys must be created out-of-band via thothctl.

### Optional

- `jit_reason` (String) Audit reason for just-in-time issuance.
- `name` (String) Display name for the API key.
- `scope_target_id` (String) Target ID for the selected scope level. Required for fleet, endpoint, and agent scopes.
- `ttl_seconds` (Number) TTL in seconds for key expiry.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether key is currently active and not expired/revoked.
- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) One-time plaintext API key (returned only on create).
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) Expiry timestamp.
- `id` (String) Resource ID (key ID).
- `key_id` (String) GovAPI key identifier.
- `last_used_at` (String) Last authorization timestamp.
- `prefix` (String) Key prefix for operator identification.
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.

## Deprecation

`scope_level`-based API key creation in this resource is deprecated. Use:

- `thoth_fleet_api_key`
- `thoth_endpoint_api_key`
- `thoth_agent_api_key`
